# spring-boot-api

A Spring Boot REST API.

## Prerequisites

```bash
sdk install java 21-tem
sdk install maven
```

## Build

```bash
mvn clean install
```

## Run

```bash
java -jar target/spring-boot-api-0.1.0.jar
```

Or with Maven:

```bash
mvn spring-boot:run
```

## API Docs

```json
{
  "openapi": "3.0.0",
  "info": { "title": "API", "version": "1.0" }
}
```
